executable.title: Circle Registration Program (MIATT)
executable.description: Register two images that contain exactly one circle

image.name: fixedImageFile
image.label: Fixed Input Image Volume
image.description: Path to the fixed input image. Must be a 2-dimensional image

image.name: movingImageFile
image.label: Moving Input Image Volume
image.description: Path to the moving input image. Must be a 2-dimensional image
